title: Small Progressions 2
description: A collection of simple utility blocks and light progressive systems for everyday automation
body:
![SP2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/deonjonker123/SmallProgressions/refs/heads/Small-Progressions-2-(MC26.1.2)/banner.png)

# Small Progressions 2

**A collection of simple utility blocks and light progressive systems for everyday automation.**

*   **Cobblestone Generators **: Generates cobblestone
*   **Lava Generator**: Generate lava
*   **Water Reservoir**: Infinite water source
*   **Lava Infused Stone**: Lava source block
*   **Simple Item Collector**
*   **Advanced Item Collector**
*   **Harvester**
*   **Growth Crystals**: Speeds up crop growth
*   **Greenhouse Glass**: Speeds up crops growth more
*   **Brick Furnace**: Smelts things fast
*   **Storage Barrels**: Stores things
*   **Fluid Tanks**: Stores fluids
*   **Linen Sack**: Stores things, but keep inventory on break
*   **McFloaty Block**: Angel block (cause why not)

*   **Magnet**
    *   Does what it says on the tin. Pulls items and EXP to the player in an 8 block radius.
    *   Keybind to toggle the magnet on/off (default `/`)
    *   Dedicated curios slot

### Solar

Just panels, batteries, and wireless power.

### Simple Wireless Redstone

Adds wireless redstone.

# Simple Wireless Logistics

Transfer items wirelessly between senders and receivers. 

## Credits

**Inspiration:** Some features and ideas in this mod were obviously inspired by the original Tiny Progressions mod.

**Textures:** Some textures were adapted from "Unused Minecraft Textures" by Malcolm Riley ([GitHub Repository](https://github.com/malcolmriley/unused-textures)). Licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License. Modifications were made to some original assets.
